evidence_basis: Agent Governance Toolkit per-action interception pattern
OpenAI Agents SDK tool guardrails/tracing pattern
rule: Before governed tool selection, BTS must receive a ranked candidate set from TOOL_UNIVERSE_RESOLVER_v1 that includes relevant sandbox tools, language runtimes, governed install profiles, competence scores, and forbidden/reliability history. BTS_TOOL_EVALUATION must cover resolver candidates or explain exclusions, and any non-top selection must pass WHY_NOT_BETTER_TOOL justification.
